tasks.subject: C-Task 0: VM reset
tasks.description:
**Goal:** vm_action gains `reset` (libvirt DomainReset on a running VM).

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestVMReset -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/vm.go","daemon/services/api/handlers.go","daemon/services/mcp/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestVMReset -v"}
```

tasks.subject: C-Task 1: Container remove
tasks.description:
**Goal:** container_action gains `remove` (+remove_image), confirm-gated, via SDK ContainerRemove(Force).

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestDockerRemove -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/docker.go","daemon/services/api/handlers.go","daemon/services/mcp/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestDockerRemove -v"}
```

tasks.subject: C-Task 2: Container autostart (verify mechanism)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SetAutostart(id, enabled) through the Unraid WebUI mechanism (verify file/format first).

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run Autostart -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/docker.go","daemon/services/api/handlers.go","daemon/services/mcp/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run Autostart -v"}
```

tasks.subject: C-Task 3: Port-conflict detection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** read-only PortConflicts() + pure detectPortConflicts; GET /docker/port-conflicts + get_port_conflicts.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestPortConflicts -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/docker.go","daemon/dto/docker.go","daemon/services/api/handlers.go","daemon/services/mcp/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestPortConflicts -v"}
```

tasks.subject: C-Task 4: Array safe-subset (verify-or-drop) [USER-GATE]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** clear-stats + disk mount/unmount ONLY if a safe Unraid mechanism is verified; else drop+document.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after each op is verified on hardware (reversibly) or explicitly dropped+documented.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestArrayDisk -v + ansible-playbook ... --tags build,deploy,verify

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/array.go","daemon/services/api/handlers.go","daemon/services/mcp/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "this-step"}
```

tasks.subject: C-Task 5: Docs + final verify + CHANGELOG [USER-GATE]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** docs/swagger/tool-count updates, final full hardware verify + CodeRabbit, THEN CHANGELOG last.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** CHANGELOG is the LAST action, only after full hardware verify + clean CodeRabbit.

**Verify:** final ansible-playbook ... --tags build,deploy,verify failed=0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/integrations/mcp.md","skills/unraid-management-agent/references/mcp-tools.md","AGENTS.md","CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "whole-plan"}
```
